summary: Iteration 41 - Global Color Change Testing Complete. All tests PASSED. Verified: 1) Global color change from #E07B39 (amber) to #FF5722 (deep orange) - NO instances of old color found on page. 2) Header: logo 40px, border-bottom rgba(255,87,34,0.25) PASS, phone #FF5722 600 14px opacity:1 PASS. 3) Map height stretch with min-height 420px and align-self stretch PASS. 4) Sticky CALL NOW button #FF5722 position fixed PASS. 5) Full homepage regression - all 10 sections present.

Phone number styling: #FF5722, fontWeight 600, fontSize 14px, opacity 1 - PASS
Map alignSelf: stretch with min-height: 420px - correctly implemented
Sticky CALL NOW button: #FF5722, fixed position, right 24px, bottom 40px - PASS
Global scan found ZERO instances of old #E07B39 color
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified global color change from warm amber #E07B39 to deep orange-red #FF5722. All accents, buttons, badges, icons, borders, links now use #FF5722. Hover color changed from #F5A05A to #FF7043. Header has border-bottom rgba(255,87,34,0.25), logo 40px, phone styling correct. Map stretches to match cities list height with min-height 420px. Sticky CALL NOW button appears after scrolling past hero with #FF5722 background. Base URL: https://appliance-hero-ui.preview.emergentagent.com
